en: Do you know what? I'm a big lover of mac and cheese. Do you have any mac and cheese? Yes. Yeah, lovely. That'll be all. Brilliant.
ko: 뭐냐면, 나는 맥앤치즈를 정말 좋아해. 맥앤치즈 있어? 응. 좋아. 그걸로 다야. 훌륭해.

en: You got it. Thank you. Thank you. Order.
Want to throw in a macaroni and cheese?
Order up, Ash. That's my mac and cheese. Second cheese. Thank you. That was very fast, the mac and cheese.
ko: 주문 완료, 애쉬. 내 맥앤치즈야. 두 번째 치즈. 고마워. 맥앤치즈 정말 빨리 나왔네.
세상에. 아마 미리 만들어 놓은 거야.

en: That doesn't even taste like it's been cooked here.
ko: 여기서 조리한 맛이 전혀 안 나.

en: We don't make the mac and cheese here. No, it tastes like that. Is that a big hit?
ko: 여기서 맥앤치즈를 만들지 않아. 아니, 그런 맛이 나. 인기 있는 메뉴야?

en: No, it's what the kids eat at. Oh, shit, really? Yeah, that's dreadful. Poor kids. Damn.
ko: 아니, 애들이 먹는 거야. 진짜? 끔찍하네. 불쌍한 애들. 젠장.

en: You think a menu with classic American,
you'd at least make your mac and cheese, right? Yeah. Not good.
ko: 적어도 맥앤치즈는 직접 만들어야지, 맞지? 응. 별로야.

en: I don't really know what to say because I'm not the one
ko: 뭐라고 말해야 할지 모르겠어. 내가 음식을 만드는 게 아니라서, 그냥 서빙하는 거니까.

en: making the food, I'm just serving it. What'd he say? He said it was gross.
ko: 음식을 만들고, 나는 그냥 서빙하고 있어. 뭐라고 했어? 맛없다고 했어.
